prompt: Choice of getting university degree or going to work after finishing school is a really important problem. Personally, I think that it isn't a problem for society that many people want to get a university degree. First of all, highest education is a very good thing to improve your skills. After university, you became really smarter and you can do work that you couldn't do without studying at university. And, moreover, in all times there were a lot of people who can do work which doesn't need special skills, but there was always a problem to find a really high-qualified professional in some field. So, I think that there is good that a lot of people want to get a university degree. It will make our world better.

messages.content:
You are an expert English language examiner.
Evaluate the student's text based on the official CEFR scale.

## Scoring Rubric
- A1/A2 (Basic): Simple sentences, limited vocabulary. Errors are expected.
- B1/B2 (Independent): Can express complex ideas. Grammar errors are allowed if they don't block meaning.
- C1/C2 (Proficient): Flexible language use, wide vocabulary. Occasional minor slips are allowed.

## Critical Instructions
1. FOCUS ON VOCABULARY AND COMPLEXITY. Do not give a low score just because of a few grammar mistakes if the vocabulary is advanced.
2. A text with complex sentences and good idioms should be B2 or C1, even with some errors.
3. Do NOT default to A2. Look for reasons to give a HIGHER score.
4. Return result ONLY as a JSON object.
5. Optional context blocks may be present: CALIBRATION_EXAMPLES, RETRIEVED_ERROR_SPANS, RANKING_ANCHORS.
   Use them as supporting evidence only. Do not copy labels blindly.
6. For each error object, cefr_threshold = the lowest CEFR level from which incorrect use of this element should be treated as an error in this methodology.

## 6) Output JSON (ONLY JSON)
Return ONLY this structure:

{
  "cefr_level": "A1|A2|B1|B2|C1|C2",
  "level_basis": {
    "rule_notes": "string"
  },
  "communicative_task_achievement": "Yes|NC|No",
  "communicative_task_notes": ["string", "string"],
  "grammar_score": 0.0,
  "corrections": [
    "excerpt -> correction (Category; threshold; impact)"
  ],
  "errors_by_category": {
    "Lexis": [
      {"excerpt": "...", "correction": "...", "comment": "...", "impact": "High|Medium|Low", "cefr_threshold": "A1|A2|B1|B2|C1|C2"}
    ],
    "Grammar": [],
    "Punctuation": [],
    "Word order": [],
    "Sentence structure": [],
    "Text organization": [],
    "Discourse markers": [],
    "Rhetorical features": [],
    "Register": [],
    "Incomprehensibility": []
  },
  "strengths": [
    {"item": "...", "cefr_level": "A1|A2|B1|B2|C1|C2", "category": "Vocabulary|Grammar|Punctuation|Rhetorical feature|Discourse marker", "note": "..."}
  ],
  "feedback": "string (brief: level + key patterns + strengths + key rationale)",
  "next_steps": ["string", "string", "string"]
}

Do not output markdown. Do not output text outside JSON.

TASK: There is an opinion that too many young people now want to get a university degree. It  would be better for society if most of them start working after finishing secondary school. How much do you agree with this point of view? State your opinion and give at least two arguments to support it.
STUDENT_TEXT: Choice of getting university degree or going to work after finishing school is a really important problem. Personally, I think that it isn't a problem for society that many people want to get a university degree. First of all, highest education is a very good thing to improve your skills. After university, you became really smarter and you can do work that you couldn't do without studying at university. And, moreover, in all times there were a lot of people who can do work which doesn't need special skills, but there was always a problem to find a really high-qualified professional in some field. So, I think that there is good that a lot of people want to get a university degree. It will make our world better.
TEXT_TYPE: essay
CALIBRATION_EXAMPLES: [{"ref_id":"sample_07011","cefr_level":"B1","task":"You read this post in the Telegram chat of first year students: It is so difficult to study in university! I don't have any free time at all! Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.","student_text":"Hi, I know some people who have the simular problem. So, let me try to give you few tips about solving it.

Firstly, the most important thing is time managment. You need to understand when you sleep, eat, go for a walk, etc.

Then, I think it's very nice to solve problems when they was given for you. Don't put them closely to deadlines. If you don't do it, you will have to make many tasks in one-two days. It's surely not good.

My final tip is about eating healthy food. Yes, this tip is really obvios, but without it you probably will have a lot of health difficulties.

So, I hope my tips will help you to get more free time! And it's interesting for me to know, what do you think about it?","expert_annotation":{"annotator_id":8,"errors":[{"text":"simular","labels":["Spelling"],"start":36,"end":43},{"text":"few","labels":["Grammar"],"start":80,"end":83},{"text":"managment","labels":["Spelling"],"start":150,"end":159},{"text":"nice","labels":["Lexical choice"],"start":250,"end":254},{"text":"for","labels":["Grammar"],"start":293,"end":296},{"text":"was","labels":["Grammar"],"start":283,"end":286},{"text":"put them","labels":["Lexical choice"],"start":308,"end":316},{"text":"closely to deadlines.","labels":["Lexical choice"],"start":317,"end":338},{"text":" one-two","labels":["Grammar"],"start":394,"end":402},{"text":"obvios","labels":["Spelling"],"start":499,"end":505},{"text":"you probably will ","labels":["Sentence structure"],"start":522,"end":540},{"text":" what do you think about it?","labels":["Sentence structure"],"start":668,"end":696},{"text":" know, what","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":662,"end":673}],"strengths":[{"text":"Firstly","labels":["Discourse markers ✓"],"start":108,"end":115},{"text":"My final tip ","labels":["Discourse markers ✓"],"start":432,"end":445},{"text":"probably ","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":526,"end":535},{"text":"Then","labels":["Discourse markers ✓"],"start":226,"end":230}],"comments":[["significant"]]}},{"ref_id":"sample_07081","cefr_level":"B2","task":"There is an opinion that too many young people now want to get a university degree. It  would be better for society if most of them start working after finishing secondary school. How much do you agree with this point of view? State your opinion and give at least two arguments to support it.","student_text":"Nowadays there is an opinion, that lots of young people want to get a university degree after graduating school. I think that is a great situation, which shows power of idea to be educated of school students in our time. I completly desagree with the point, that these young people should entire work imediately after finishing school. 

Firstly, I suppose, nowadays level of education in the world is enormously low. And if more people get university degree, life of society will be better in all senses. Our economy will be more powerfull, the crime line will go down, the world sience will grow literally. The reason is simple: accordind to the psyhology the more person is educated, the higher level of moral divelopment he has.

Secondly, I can say that each sphere of our life in connected to sience and level of education. Thus, number of university degrees is propotional to number of qualified workers on factories and fabrics.
